use clap::Parser;
use std::path::PathBuf;

#[derive(Parser)]
struct Cli {
    #[arg(long)]
    paths: Vec<PathBuf>,
}

fn run(cli: Cli) {
    for path in &cli.paths {
        for entry in walkdir::WalkDir::new(path) {
            let entry = entry.unwrap();
            let _ = std::fs::read_to_string(entry.path());
        }
    }
}
